LIGHT REFLECTS FROM THE APPROACHING MAN'S FACE. BENEATH THE CHROME THE FEATURES ARE FAMILIAR. HE LAUGHS MANIACALLY, 'FOOLS! I CANNOT FALL UNTIL THE SYSTEM IS PURGED OF WEAKNESS!'
THE TINY SUN IS ECLIPSED BY A HUGE SHAPE, THE SIZE OF A BATTLER, BUT OF NO CONFIGURATION YOU RECOGNIZE. IT PULSES IN A DISTURBINGLY LIFE-LIKE MANNER AS IT SILENTLY CLOSES IN.
THE HUGE WINGED SHAPE TURNS AWKWARDLY TOWARDS YOU. 'PARDON ME. WE ARE BORN TO WEIGHTLESSNESS. EVEN THIS MINIMAL GRAVITY IS AN IRRITATION.'

WHAT IS THE ATTACK LOCATION NUMBER?
SCOT.DOS WELCOMES YOU BACK TO YOUR SHIP. '
YOUR MISSION HAS NOT BEEN COMPLETED. I CANNOT LET YOU DISGRACE YOURSELF BY LEAVING.'
THIS IS VERY DISTRESSING. THE TERRAN SHIP HAS LEFT ORBIT ON A COURSE TOWARD EARTH.
WE SHOULD LEAVE FOR SALVATION IMMEDIATELY TO GET ROMNEY'S PAPERS TO BUCK ROGERS.'
YOU ENTER YOUR SHIP AND HEAD FOR SALVATION, THE SECRET HEADQUARTERS OF NEO.
YOU MUST FIND THOSE PAPERS YOU GAVE TO DE SADE AND BRING THEM TO SALVATION.'
THE COMPUTER COMES TO LIFE. 'THE CORONATION IS ABOUT TO BEGIN. STAY WHERE YOU ARE AND SOMEONE WILL MEET YOU.'

DE SADE APPROACHES. 'I WARNED BERKELEY THAT YOU WOULD BE MORE TROUBLE THAN YOU'RE WORTH. GO TO THE CORONATION HALL IN THE SOUTHWEST CORNER OF THE STATION AT ONCE, AND STAY OUT OF OTHER PEOPLE'S FIGHTS.'
SCOT.DOS LOOKS GRIM. 'THIS IS MORE SERIOUS THAN I THOUGHT. HURRY, LAUNCH PREPARATIONS ARE BEGINNING.
THEY DRAW THEIR WEAPONS. 'THESE ARE THE ONES THAT DESTROYED THE DOOMSDAY LASER!'
NOTICES A RAM INSIGNIA BENEATH THEIR COLLARS.
MERCURIANS CONFRONT YOU. ONE MENTIONS SOMETHING ABOUT DE SADE'S ORDERS.
LUNARIANS STAND WATCH. DO YOU QUESTION THEM?
THEY AGREE TO TALK. 'THAT TERRAN'S A NASTY ONE. HE WAS CAUSING TROUBLE OVER BY BERTH A.'
THE LUNARIANS REFUSE TO GET INVOLVED.
SECURITY BOTS GUARD THE AIRLOCK. 'ACCESS TO THE WARRENS IS DENIED.'
THE TERRAN LEADER GLARES AT YOU. 'YOU ARE TOO LATE! WE HAVE ROMNEY AND SOON A NEW ORDER WILL RULE THE SOLAR SYSTEM.
THE GROUND SHAKES AS A ROCKET BLASTS OFF. THE TERRANS GRIN MALICIOUSLY.
YOU HEAR THE CARGO ELEVATOR DOORS SNICK SHUT, THEN NOTICE THAT THE TERRAN LEADER'S BODY IS MISSING.
RAM WARRIORS STAND BY THE AIRLOCK WITH GUARD DOGS. 'NEO SCUM,' ONE SAYS.
SPOILING FOR A FIGHT, THEY ATTACK!
THE TELLTALE ON THE DOOR READS,
A SERVICE DROID APPROACHES YOU. 'WELCOME TO THE RISING SUN. ARE YOU STAYING?'
AN OLD ROCKET JOCK WITH BLEARY EYES GREETS YOU WITH A SLURRED VOICE.
A DISEMBODIED VOICE ECHOES THROUGH THE HALL, '
A MINER BECOMES INTERESTED. 'IN THE WARRENS, THEY SAY BERKELEY IS GOING TO GIVE AWAY ALL OUR BUSINESS.'
A DANCER TELLS YOU HOW SHE WAS HARASSED BY THE TERRANS AT BERTH A. 'I WASN'T DOING ANYTHING. CALLED ME SUBHUMAN.'
YOU CHAT WITH THE MINERS. NOW
A TINNY VOICE INTONES, 'THIS IS A CARGO ELEVATOR ONLY. PLEASE EXIT.'
TECHNICIANS ARE BUSY AT THEIR COM STATIONS.
THE PORTMASTER IS TOO BUSY TO SPEAK TO YOU.
CHANCELLOR DE SADE SHAKES YOUR HAND GRACIOUSLY. '
WITH BERKELEY DEAD, THERE IS NO NEED TO CONTINUE ANY NEGOTIATIONS ON AN ALLIANCE. NEVERTHELESS,
IT IS GOOD THAT YOU WERE HERE, AND TO SHOW OUR APPRECIATION,
HERE IS PAYMENT FOR YOUR SERVICES.'
YOU NEGOTIATE WITH THE CHANCELLOR, BUT FAIL TO COME TO ANY FIRM AGREEMENT ON THE ALLIANCE.
DO YOU TELL HIM ABOUT ROMNEY AND THE TERRANS?
YOU GO OVER ROMNEY'S PAPERS WITH HIM
HE EYES YOU FOR A LONG MOMENT, DEBATING SOMETHING IN HIS MIND. HE FLASHES A SEDUCTIVE SMILE AND CHANGES THE SUBJECT.
DE SADE ENTERTAINS YOU FOR A WHILE LONGER, THEN LEAVES.
DE SADE AND RAM AGENTS ARE EXAMINING ROMNEY'S PAPERS.
A MAN CARRYING A BUNDLE OF PAPERS RUSHES UP TO YOU. HE GRABS YOUR ARM DESPERATELY. 'I AM DR. ROMNEY. PLEASE HELP ME GET TO THE SUN KING. IT IS MOST URGENT.'
BEFORE HE CAN EXPLAIN, YOU HEAR THE STOMP OF BOOTED FEET AND THE CLAMOR OF ARMS BEING READIED. ROMNEY CRIES OUT IN EXASPERATION.
NOTICES THAT THE LEADER IS WEARING A DISTINCTIVE RING, THE LETTERS P-U-R-G-E DISPLAYED PROMINENTLY.
THE TERRAN LEADER GRABS ROMNEY AND SHOVES HIM TOWARD A GROUNDCAR.
YOU TRY TO GET ROMNEY AWAY FROM THE TERRANS, BUT THE LEADER QUICKLY
PUSHES ROMNEY INTO THE CAR AND SPEEDS OFF TO THE SOUTH, SHOUTING, 'KILL THESE ABOMINATIONS!'
YOU SHOUT FOR SECURITY AS THE TERRAN LEADER PUSHES ROMNEY INTO THE GROUNDCAR AND THEY SPEED SOUTHWARD.
SECURITY FORCES ARRIVE. THEY ASSURE YOU THAT THEY WILL ROUND UP THE TROUBLE MAKERS AND SORT THINGS OUT AT THE SECURITY OFFICE.
NOW THAT YOU ARE ALONE, DO YOU LOOK AT THE BUNDLE OF PAPERS?
THE HALL IS THRONGED WITH DIGNITARIES AND PERSONAGES FROM DIVERSE CULTURES: DANCERS, MUSICIANS, LUNARIANS, VENUSIANS, AND TERRANS.
NOTICES THE CHANCELLOR TALKING FURTIVELY WITH A GROUP OF MEN.
THE SUN KING ASCENDS THE DAIS. 'BROTHERS AND SISTERS, I ACCEPT THIS CROWN IN YOUR NAME AND ASK YOU TO SHARE MY DREAM: A SOLAR SYSTEM FILLED WITH BROTHERLY LOVE, WHERE HARMONY REIGNS.
NOTICES A GROUP OF MARTIANS REACHING INTO THEIR ROBES, POSSIBLY FOR A WEAPON.
THE HALL ERUPTS IN VIOLENCE AS THE MARTIANS PULL THEIR WEAPONS AND FIRE. THE SUN KING COLLAPSES WITH A GREAT WOUND IN HIS CHEST.
YOU KNOCK THE SUN KING BEHIND THE DAIS JUST AS THE ASSASSINS FIRE. THE MASSIVE VID-SCREEN BEHIND HIM EXPLODES IN A SHOWER OF SPARKS.
THE SUN KING THANKS YOU FOR SAVING HIS LIFE. 'SEE MY CHANCELLOR IN THE ROOM TO THE SOUTHEAST. HE'LL SEE TO YOUR REWARD.'
THE CHANCELLOR GRABS YOUR ARM. 'BERKELEY IS DEAD, WHICH PUTS ME IN POWER. SEE ME IN MY OFFICE JUST SOUTHEAST. I WILL PAY YOU FOR YOUR SERVICE.'
CELLOR GRABS YOUR ARM. 'BERKELEY IS DEAD, WHICH PUTS ME IN POWER. SEE ME IN MY OFFICE JUST SOUTHEAST. I
PEOPLE MILL ABOUT, WAITING FOR THE SUN KING.
THE AUTODOCS HUM SOOTHINGLY. 'DO YOU NEED HEALING?'
HOLD ON, A MESSAGE FOR YOU IS JUST COMING IN.'
IT'S A PITY ABOUT LORD BERKELEY. HIS MESSAGE OF PEACE MIGHT HAVE UNITED MERCURY.'
GOOD JOB, TEAM. A LITTLE OF LORD BERKELEY'S PHILOSOPHY IS JUST WHAT MERCURY
BUCK TAKES DR. ROMNEY'S NOTES. 'VERY INTERESTING. I'LL HAVE SCOT.DOS LOOK AT THESE. THEY MAY PROVE USEFUL.
YOU CHECK IN WITH COMMANDER ROGERS.
YOU ARRIVE AT SALVATION. AS BUCK GUIDES THE CRUISER IN, YOU SEE THE MAELSTROM RIDER DOCKED IN THE NEXT BAY!
YOU, BUCK, NATBAKKA, AND THE OTHERS DISEMBARK. BUCK TURNS TO YOU.
TOLD ME THAT PURGE HAS A SPY PLANTED AT OUR FORTUNA BASE.
BUCK GUIDES THE OTHERS OFF AS YOU ENTER SALVATION'S MAIN HALL.
BUCK REMINDS YOU OF YOUR MISSION
FIND THAT GRAVITATIONAL MECHANICS EXPERT ON VENUS
BUCK REMINDS YOU OF YOUR MISSION
SEARCH FOR THE NEO SPY AT OUR FORTUNA BASE
FIND DR. MALCOLN AT PURGE HEADQUARTERS
BUCK MEETS YOU. 'YOU SHOULD GO FIND THE STORMRIDERS' FUNGUS ASTEROID.'
RAM WILL GET THEIR LASER. WE WERE LUCKY TO STOP THEM THIS TIME. WE MIGHT NOT BE SO LUCKY IN THE FUTURE.JQJI91#
SCOT.DOS' IMAGE APPEARS ON BUCK'S COMM SCREEN. 'HELLO, COMMANDER. I HAVEN'T FOUND MUCH, BUT HERE'S WHAT I'VE GOT.
I CAN GATHER, I SUSPECT THAT RESEARCH IN GRAVITATIONAL MECHANICS IS BEING DONE SOMEWHERE IN THE VENUS LOWLANDS.
BUCK BRINGS YOU TO HIS OFFICE. 'WE HAVE SOME NEW INFORMATION FOR YOU...SCOT.DOS, REPORT.'
BUCK HANDS YOU A PASSCARD. 'THIS WILL GET YOU INTO TOWER ISLE, AGENT CARRIN'S BUILDING.'
BUCK TURNS TO LEAVE, BUT CARLTON TURABIAN AND NATBAKKA RUSH UP. 'BUCK, WE'VE JUST RECEIVED A RADIO MESSAGE FROM LEANDER ON JUPITER. I'M AFRAID IT'S BAD NEWS.
NATBAKKA CHIMES IN. 'YES, MY PEOPLE ARE COMBATTING THE TYRANNY OF OUR GENOTYPE CREATORS, GENETICS FOUNDATION. I UNDERSTAND MAKALI'S DILEMMA.'
BUCK TURNS TO YOU. 'WE'LL HAVE TO FIGURE OUT A WAY TO GET YOU TO JUPITER. WE DON'T HAVE A SHIP WITH ENOUGH FUEL CAPACITY TO GET THERE. HMM...'
WHERE DO YOU WISH TO GO?
YOU ARE IN THE SALVATION PORT AREA.
YOU PREPARE YOUR SHIP FOR LAUNCH...
THE NEO MECHANICS REPAIR YOUR SHIP.
YOU WAKE AND LEAVE YOUR QUARTERS.
THE AUTODOC HEALS EVERYONE IN THE TEAM.
YOU ENTER 'THE LOST ORBIT' -- SALVATION'S PORT LOUNGE.
A ROUND OF DRINKS WILL COST
JUST AS THE BARTENDER SHOUTS, 'LAST CALL!'
IS IN NO CONDITION TO PAY! SOMEONE ELSE?
YOU CHAT WITH THE OTHER PATRONS.
YOU BUMS GONNA BUY A DRINK...OR WHAT?
THIS AIN'T NO PUBLIC PARK! BUY A DRINK...OR BLAST OUTTA HERE!
A CLERK APPROACHES YOUR TABLE. 'HEARD ABOUT WHAT HAPPENED IN NEW LONDONORG?
CARLTON TURABIAN WALKS UP. 'STEP IT UP, FOLKS! DON'T YOU HAVE BETTER THINGS TO DO?'
A NEO CAPTAIN BUYS A ROUND OF DRINKS. 'WE JUST SHOT UP A RAM CRUISER OFF AURORA!'
A CHEER GOES UP. THE BARTENDER LOOKS HAPPY.
AN UNKEMPT LOOKING ROCKET JOCK STEPS UP.
AGREES TO BET. YOU WATCH IN AMAZEMENT AS THE MAN SETS AN EMPTY GLASS ON A TABLE, STEPS ACROSS THE ROOM, AND TOSSES A COIN OVER HIS SHOULDER.
THE COIN SPINS THROUGH THE AIR AND LANDS SQUARELY IN THE GLASS.
YOU NOTICE CARLTON TURABIAN DRINKING IN A BACK BOOTH.
HE EYES YOU WITH DISAPPROVAL AS HE LEAVES.
AN OLD WARRIOR EYES YOU WITH APPROVAL. HE DRAWS A FINE MONO SWORD.
A MINER TELLS YOU ABOUT JUPITER, 'I'D LIKE TO GET INTO DIP MINING THE JUPITER ATMOSPHERE, BUT THOSE STORMRIDERS GOT IT ALL TIED UP!'
THE BAR CLOSES. YOU GO TO YOUR QUARTERS. YOU CLIMB IN BED.
BUCK GREETS PROFESSOR CHADE, 'IT IS A PLEASURE TO MEET YOU DR. CHADE. WE ARE GLAD TO PUT YOUR WORK TO GOOD USE.'
STEFI SPEAKS, 'YOUR AGENTS HAVE TOLD ME ABOUT YOUR PROJECT. I HIGHLY APPROVE.'
AND THE FISSION CHAMBER SIMULATION PROGRAM
BUCK ASSIGNS AN AIDE TO HELP STEFI SETTLE IN. SHE LEAVES, 'I'LL SEE YOU AROUND. GOOD LUCK!'
BUCK PRAISES YOU FOR YOUR CONDUCT ON VENUS. 'LEANDER ARRIVED HERE JUST A FEW HOURS AGO.
BUCK SPEAKS. 'I NEVER WOULD HAVE SUSPECTED THAT OUR SPY WAS ZACARY CEBERT! TOO BAD HE DIDN'T SURVIVE, I'D HAVE LIKED TO QUESTION HIM.
YOU HAND BUCK THE EFANITE FILES. 'GREAT, TEAM! WE'VE PROVIDED LEANDER WITH THE BEST CHEMISTRY EQUIPMENT WE HAVE.
DO YOU WANT TO USE THE CLINIC?
LIFE SUPPORT HAS SUFFERED TOO MUCH DAMAGE.
DO YOU WANT TO FIX ANOTHER TEAM MEMBER?
A SHOCK WAVE ROCKS YOUR SHIP AS THE BASE EXPLODES.
YOU HEAR THE TINK OF DEBRIS AS IT HITS YOUR SHIP.
YOU PUT SOME DISTANCE BETWEEN YOUR SHIP AND THE BASE, THEN WATCH AS IT EXPLODES IN A BRILLIANT SHOWER OF SPARKS.
A HEAVY CRUISER BARRELS IN ON YOU.
IT SHOWS A HEAVY CRUISER CLOSING FAST.
THE PIRATE SHIP SOON DISAPPEARS OFF LR SCANNER.
DEBRIS FROM THE DESTROYED SHIP TINKS AGAINST THE HULL.
YOU EASE INTO ORBIT AROUND MERCURY AND FLIP THE COM SWITCH FOR A FINAL BRIEFING. THE IMAGE OF BUCK ROGERS, NOW IN CHARGE OF SPECIAL MISSIONS, APPEARS ONSCREEN.
YOU STEP OUT ONTO THE EXPANSIVE DOCK AND FIND IT THRONGED WITH PEOPLE DRESSED FOR THE CORONATION. A MAN APPROACHES.
A NEO CRUISER FINDS YOU AND HELPS YOU OUT.
THE COM SQUAWKS WITH AN INCOMING MESSAGE. '...TO MAELSTROM RIDER... DR. WILLIAMS. IS THAT YOU DR. WILLIAMS?'
YOU GUIDE THE SHIP INTO DOCK.
YOU TRY TO BLUFF YOUR WAY OUT.
YOU CONVINCE THEM THAT YOU ARE ON THEIR SIDE.
YOU HAVE NO FUEL TO RUN.
PORT AUTHORITY DENIES YOU DOCKING CLEARANCE.
DO YOU PAY THEM THE MONEY YOU OWE FOR DAMAGING THE PORT?
YOU DON'T HAVE THAT KIND OF MONEY.
BUT YOU MAKE IT IN SAFELY.
YOU SUFFER MAJOR DAMAGE TO THE HULL AND
SLIPS A LITTLE ON THE THROTTLE.
THE DOCKING RINGS SNICK TOGETHER AS
BACKS DOWN THE POWER A LITTLE TOO LATE.
THE COUPLING IS MADE, AND THE AIRLOCKS HISS AS THEY OPEN.
YOU GRIND INTO THE DOCKING RINGS, CAUSING MINOR DAMAGE.
SLAMS THE SHIP INTO THE DOCK.
PORT AUTHORITY YAMMERS ABOUT DAMAGES, DEMANDING PAYMENT.
YOU DO NOT HAVE ENOUGH MONEY.
THE DOCK COUPLING DISENGAGES AND YOU ARE CUT LOSE.
PORT AUTHORITY BLACKLISTS YOUR SHIP. DO YOU RETALIATE?
DISTRESS CALLS GO OUT. OTHER SHIPS AT THE PORT LAUNCH AN ATTACK ON YOU!
CARLTON TURABIAN COMES ON SCREEN, OBVIOUSLY DISPLEASED.
STEFI STAYS IN THE SHIP WHILE YOU ADVENTURE.
HIGH WINDS AND LIGHTNING RAGE OVER THE PLANET.
BRANCH OF THE BANK OF LUNA.
MONEY CAN'T BE RETURNED ONCE IN SALVAGE ACCOUNT.
NO BARTENDER WILL LET YOU IN.
YOU'RE STUFFED AND HAVE TO LEAVE.
YOU'RE DRUNK. THE BARTENDER THROWS YOU OUT.
EVERYONE IS TIRED OF YOUR QUESTIONS.
A MONSTROUS LOOKING PIRATE SHOVES YOU AND GROWLS UNINTELLIGIBLY.
THE PIRATE SETTLES DOWN. 'I JUST RAN INTO A GROUP OF TERRANS WEARING A PATCH THAT SAID PURGE. IT LOOKED LIKE THEY WERE GETTING READY FOR WAR.
ANYWAYS, WE TOOK THEIR SHIP AND VENTED THE LOT OF 'EM.'
THE PIRATE SPITS ON YOUR BOOT AND MOVES AWAY.
A SECURITY OFFICER SAYS, 'THE MAN WAS HALF ROBOT, I TELL YOU.
HE WAS ON HIS WAY TO COPERNICUS, MUTTERING ABOUT A MATRIX ALMOST BEING COMPLETE.'
HE WAS NEARLY DEAD. HE SHOUTED THAT HE WOULD RETURN STRONGER THAN EVER.'
A SECURITY OFFICER SAYS, 'DOING A TOUR OF ALL THE MASS DRIVERS. THE BRASS IS WORRIED ABOUT A REVOLUTION ON TERRA.'
A TERRAN MENTIONS A MIRACLE DEVICE. 'A MATTER OF WEEKS, AND IT WILL BE DONE. EARTH WILL RISE AGAIN UNDER A GREAT VISIONARY.'
MEN BEGIN TO GATHER AT A BACK TABLE, TRICKLING IN BY ONES AND TWOS.
SOME PATRONS SHOUT, 'WE DON'T LIKE YOU NEO SNOOPS AROUND HERE!'
THE PLACE IS CROWDED. AN EMCEE STANDS ON A MAKE-SHIFT STAGE.
THE CROWD RAISES A CHEER FOR YOUR PERFORMANCE.
YOU ARE BOOED OFF THE STAGE.
YOU SEARCH THE STACKS FOR ANY IMPORTANT INFORMATION.
YOU GET LOST AND WASTE THE AFTERNOON FINDING YOUR WAY OUT.
YOU SEARCH, BUT YOU FIND NOTHING INTERESTING.
IS SCANNING A REPORT, SOME INTERESTING INFORMATION IS UNCOVERED.
WHERE DO YOU WISH TO GO?
TYCHO SPACEPORT ON THE SURFACE OF LUNA
DOESN'T HAVE ENOUGH MONEY. DOES ANYONE ELSE WANT TO PAY?
A MEALY MOUTHED SPACER LOOKS YOU OVER CAREFULLY, BUT SEEMS INDECISIVE ABOUT APPROACHING YOU.
THE SPACER DECIDES TO TALK. 'I HAVE SEEN MANY STORMRIDERS AROUND THE ASTEROID BELT. QUITE UNUSUAL. IT HAS THE FEEL OF SOMETHING BIG.'
A MERCURIAN JOINS YOU AND WHISPERS, 'A RAM SPY HAS PENETRATED NEO.'
HE WAS TAKEN CARE OF BY ELITE TROOPS, BUT THE VERY IDEA! I CAN'T BELIEVE IT.'
THE MAITRE DROID POLITELY TELLS YOU TO LEAVE.
YOU CHARGE THROUGH THE BOARDING TUBE AND ATTACK!
THE PIRATE CAPTAIN STEPS FORWARD. 'LET'S SETTLE THIS AMICABLY. YOU GET SOME EASY MONEY AND WE SAIL AWAY. HOW ABOUT IT?'
THIS LEADS TO THE BOARDING TUBE TO YOUR SHIP. DO YOU CONTINUE?'
THE ENEMY TRIES TO STOP YOU FROM REENTERING YOUR SHIP.
THAT WAS THE LAST OF THE CREW.
THE BATTLE HAS SEALED THE DOOR.
THE REMAINING FORCES ARE CUTTING THROUGH THE AIRLOCK.
WITH THIS VICTORY THE ENEMY CRUMBLES.
YOU ARE AT A LADDER. WHERE DO YOU GO?
AN EXPERT PROGRAMMER MIGHT BE ABLE TO REROUTE CONTROL THROUGH HERE, BUT THE SYSTEM IS DEGRADING FAST. DO YOU TRY?
YOU SUCCEED IN TAKING CONTROL OF THE SHIP.
THIS SECURES THE SHIP. THE CREW SURRENDERS.
A GUARD SHOUTS TO ANOTHER, 'KILL THE PRISONERS! WE'LL DELAY THEM.'
THE REMAINING GUARDS ENTER THE ROOM JUST NORTH.
YOU ARE JUST IN TIME TO PREVENT A SLAUGHTER.
THE PRISONERS THANK YOU. WITH THEIR HELP YOU QUICKLY SECURE THE SHIP.
A SIGN ABOVE THE DOOR READS,
THE CAPTAIN'S GUARDS TRY TO STOP YOU.
THE CAPTAIN WAS KILLED IN THE EXCHANGE. YOU QUICKLY DISARM THE SELF-DESTRUCT. THE CREW SURRENDERS TO YOU.
YOU TRY TO FIND SOMEWHERE TO HIDE.
RAM ASSASSINS ARE SWARMING THE SHIP. THIS IS A TRAP!
SCOT CALLS. 'TAKE CARE OF THAT SHIP QUICKLY! ANOTHER ONE IS APPROACHING -- AND ITS BIGGER!
YOUR SHIP'S PROXIMITY ALARM HAS TRIGGERED. ANOTHER SHIP MUST BE NEARBY!
A MECHANICAL VOICE INTONES, 'CAPTAIN HAS ACTIVATED SELF-DESTRUCT FROM HIS CABIN. DETONATION IN 50.'
A SPEAKER BLARES. 'IF INTRUDERS REACH PRISON LEVEL, KILL THE PRISONERS.'
SCOT CONTACTS YOU. 'ENEMY FORCES ARE TRYING TO FORCE THEIR WAY INTO THE SHIP. RETURN IMMEDIATELY!'
YOUR SHIP'S ALARM INDICATES SOMEONE IS TRYING TO ENTER YOUR SHIP.
UNDER THE LEADERSHIP OF BUCK ROGERS, YOUR TEAM MUST NOW EMBARK ON A MISSION OF SALVATION.
THIS ADVENTURE TAKES YOU TO THE FURTHEST REACHES OF CIVILIZED SPACE AND BEYOND.
TO SAVE THE EARTH, YOU MUST OVERCOME THE DISTRUST OF MYSTERIOUS ALIEN CULTURES.
NOT EVERYONE BELIEVES IN YOUR CAUSE.
HELP CAN ARRIVE FROM UNEXPECTED DIRECTIONS...
YOU MUST OUTWIT AS WELL AS OUTFIGHT YOUR OPPONENTS TO SURVIVE THIS PERILOUS MISSION.
YOU LAND AT DUKE'S HILL SPACEPORT IN LOSANGELORG.
YOU RADIO A LOCAL NEO AID STATION FOR HELP. SOON MEDICS ARRIVE. 'WITH IMMEDIATE ATTENTION, HE'LL BE OKAY.
WITH THE PASSCARD BUCK ROGERS GAVE YOU. DO YOU ENTER?
YOU CAN GET RED CARRIN'S BOAT AT THE TOWER ISLE DOCK. DO YOU?
REGULATIONS DISALLOW YOUR ENTRANCE TO THE NEWPORG
WITHOUT POSSESSION OF THE PROPERLY AUTHORIZED PASSCARD.
YOU REACH YOUR BOAT. DO YOU USE IT?
YOU GET ON YOUR BOAT AND LAUNCH.
YOU LAND AT SANTA CATALINA ISLAND. DO YOU RETURN TO YOUR BOAT?
A SECTION OF THE SPRAWL HAS BEEN WALLED OFF. FURTHER DOWN YOU SEE AN OPENING. DO YOU GO THROUGH IT?
AS YOU APPROACH THE BUILDING, A NEO AGENT BECKONS TO YOU FROM NEARBY. IT IS WILMA DEERING.
SCOT.DOS MATERIALIZES USING THE HOLO PROJECTOR ON WILMA'S COMPDEX. 'I JUST THOUGHT I'D CHECK IN TO TELL YOU THAT I WON'T BE ABLE TO CONTACT YOU INSIDE.
AS YOU APPROACH THE MESA, A BEEPING SOUND ISSUES FROM THE DEVICE YOU FOUND IN THE GANG'S QUARTER.
DO YOU PRESS THE DEVICE'S BUTTON?
A BEAM OF LIGHT SHOOTS OUT AND STRIKES THE MESA. IT SHIMMERS, THEN FADES. THE MESA WAS HOLOGRAM!
A LARGE BUILDING IS REVEALED. A SIGN OVER THE FRONT DOOR READS 'HISTORICAL MUSEUM.'
DO YOU ENTER THE HISTORICAL MUSEUM?
DUKE'S HILL SPACEPORT. YOUR SHIP IS HERE. DO YOU LEAVE EARTH?
YOU FIND A SMALL BUILDING. THE SIGN OVER THE DOOR READS, 'KRUN -- HOME OF QUALITY ROCK 'N ROLL.' DO YOU ENTER?
THE KRUN BUILDING. MAD DOG RUNS UP TO YOU.
BAD DOG TURNS ON A POCKET RADIO. AN ANGRY, AUTHORITATIVE VOICE ISSUE OUT OF IT. '...GENETIC MONSTERS MUST BE DESTROYED, FOR THEY ARE BRINGING DOWN...'
BAD DOG TURNS DOWN THE VOLUME. 'MAN, OH, MAN! I CAN'T EVEN STAND TO LISTEN!
HEY, YOU GUYS HAVE GUNS...MAYBE YOU COULD DO SOMETHING ABOUT ALL THIS?'
A SMALL BUILDING. A DESERT RUNNER RUNS UP TO YOU.
BAD DOG MEETS YOU. 'HEY, COOL, YOU'RE BACK! READY TO GO FIGHT THE BAD GUYS?'
YOU ENTER THE BUILDING. BAD DOG STAYS OUTSIDE. 'YOU GUYS ARE GREAT!'
SOME WARREN DWELLERS ARE GATHERED AROUND A LARGE SEWER DRAIN. DO YOU APPROACH THEM?
AS YOU APPROACH, AN OLD WOMAN TURNS TO YOU. 'OH, HELP US! RATWURST HAVE TAKEN SOME OF OUR CHILDREN INTO THEIR DENS! NONE OF US ARE STRONG ENOUGH TO FACE THE VERMIN.'
DO YOU HELP THE DISTRAUGHT WARREN DWELLERS?
THE WOMAN THANKS YOU AS YOU STEP INTO THE SEWER DRAIN.
RATWURST CHARGE AT YOU OVER THE SAND.
CLIMBING OVER A SAND DUNE, YOU SEE A GROUP IN THE DISTANCE. RAM SOLDIERS GUARD A LINE OF DESERT RUNNERS IN CHAINS.
THEY ARE THE RAM SLAVERS THAT BAD DOG TOLD YOU ABOUT. DO YOU ATTACK?
YOU CHARGE THE SLAVERS. THE DESERT RUNNERS JOIN THE FRAY.
THE DESERT RUNNERS THANK YOU. 'RAM HAS BEEN USING OUR VILLAGE TO FEED THEIR SLAVE PENS. I THANK YOU FOR OUR FREEDOM.
THE RAM SOLDIERS LEAD THE DESERT RUNNERS INTO THE DISTANCE.
A WARREN DWELLER CARRYING A RADIO PASSES YOU. YOU HEAR SOME OF THE BROADCAST.
A SMALL CROWD HAS GATHERED AROUND A GARISHLY PAINTED HAND CART. DO YOU INVESTIGATE?
YOU MOVE CLOSER. A TALL MAN SEEMS TO BE SELLING SOME PRODUCT FROM THE CART. SMALL, BLACK BOXES SIT ON A TABLE IN FRONT OF HIM.
THE SALESMAN PRESSES A BUTTON ON ONE OF THE BOXES. THE FORM OF A ROBED WOMAN FLICKERS INTO EXISTENCE FLOATING A FEW FEET ABOVE THE TABLE.
THE IMAGE GROWS MORE VIVID. SOON THE WOMAN SEEMS AS SOLID AS ANY OF THE WARREN DWELLERS PRESSED AROUND YOU.
THE CROWD MURMURS IN APPRECIATION. THERE IS A BEEP FROM YOUR PACK.
IT IS THE DEVICE THAT YOU FOUND IN THE WHITE MONKS' HOLDING CELL!
DO YOU PRESS THE DEVICE'S BUTTON?
YOU PRESS THE BUTTON. A PALE BEAM OF LIGHT SHOOTS OUT AND PIERCES THE FLOATING HOLOGRAM.
THE SALESMAN'S FACE FALLS AS HIS HOLOGRAM BEGINS TO MELT. THE WOMAN SHRINKS BACK INTO THE BLACK BOX WHICH ITSELF BEGINS TO SMOKE. THE LIGHT FROM THE DEVICE SHUTS OFF.
SEEMING NOT TO HAVE NOTICED THE BEAM, THE SALESMAN IS PERPLEXED. 'D-DON'T WORRY FOLKS, HEH, IT'S PROBABLY JUST A MINOR PROBLEM.'
AS THE MAN FIDDLES WITH HIS BOX, THE CROWD MOVES OFF.
YOU LEAVE THE CART AND THE CROWD ALONE.
SOME OF THE CROWD STEP FORWARD, AND BEGIN TO BARTER WITH THE SALESMAN FOR SCULPTURES. SOON HE SELLS HIS ENTIRE LOT. HE CLOSES UP THE CART AND PULLS IT OFF.
YOU WALK ALONG A MUDDY RIVER.
YOU WALK ON A RUINED FREEWAY.
YOU ENTER THE POVERTY STRICKEN SPRAWL.
YOU CROSS THE BAY ON A NEWPORG BRIDGE.
YOU MAY ONLY DOCK AT TOWER ISLE IN THE FJORD.
THE ROUGH SURF MAKES IT IMPOSSIBLE TO LAND HERE.
YOU LAND ON SANTA CATALINA ISLAND.
YOU ENTER THE WARREN AT STREET LEVEL. SKELETAL PEOPLE GAWK FROM GUTTED, HALF-CRUMBLED BUILDINGS, THEN GO BACK TO SCAVENGING THROUGH THE RUBBLE. YOU RECOIL AT THE STENCH OF DEPRIVATION AND DEATH.
